title: Kernelについて、soul.mdもしくはphilosophy.mdを作るべきか？方法としてはobsidianにある情報を抽出して作成する。マルチエージェント・オーケストレーションで点数化して評価せよ
summary_text: best option=B: implement deterministic ranking + top-N (with minimal, explicit noise exclusions) so review is bounded and repeatable, rather than trying to broaden exclusions and still leaving an unbounded candidate surface. target acceptance metric: reduce review surface from 333 to `N=40` per cycle, achieve `precision@40 >= 0.75`, and keep `false-positive review burden <= 25%` while preserving at least `recall@40 >= 0.70` against a small seeded validation set of important philosophy-delta items. failure mode: high-value but low-frequency candidates can drop out of top-N (recall hit) when the scoring model underweights rare but important phrasing, so a periodic random-sample audit of the lower-ranked tail is required.
